title: FireWasFired
description: Gives the fire overlay the pink slip (when you have fire resistance active).
body:
# Summary 

When you (the player) are on fire, an overlay is rendered that takes up an enormous portion of the screen, regardless of whether its helpful (whether you have fire resistance). This mod simply disables the fire overlay when you have fire resistance active.

# Side

Client-side.

It probably won't crash the server if installed server-side, but it definitely won't do anything.

# Configuration

None. Remove the mod to disable.

# Updates / Other loaders

Most likely none. There's better options for other versions and other loaders.

It's also like 3 lines of code (not incl. boilerplate) so I'm probably going to forget this exists when I'm done playing on (Neo)Forge @ 1.20.1.
